data.name: LearningStepFailed
data.value: Learning step {StepName} failed for turn event {TurnEventId}

data.name: ContextAssembled
data.value: Context assembled: ~{Tokens} tokens, {Wiki} wiki, {Turns} turns, {Excluded} exclusions

data.name: SelfImprovementPipelineCompletedWithFailures
data.value: Self-improvement pipeline completed with failures for {TurnEventId}: {Failures}

data.name: SelfImprovementWorkerFailed
data.value: Self-improvement worker failed for turn event {TurnEventId}

data.name: TurnEventEnqueueFailed
data.value: Failed to enqueue turn event for self-improvement

data.name: TurnEventRestoreFailed
data.value: Failed to restore queued turn event from {Path}
